title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at The Man Company

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at The Man Company
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with The Man Company! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Chandigarh team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About The Man Company:
The Man Company is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with The Man Company!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
